titleStmt.title: SII 16.173: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 173. (A.R. No. 471 of 1906.) JILLĒḶḶA, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near a water course by the side of the road.
This is dated Śaka 1471, Saumya, Āshāḍha śu. 11, corresponding to 1549 A.D., July 5, (Friday).

It records a gift of the income derived out of the kāṇike and other taxes collected in Jilleḷa, a gift village of Ahōbala Narasiṁhadēva temple, to god Vīrabhadra at Jilleḷa, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chinna Timmarāju Koṇḍayyadēva Mahārāju, for the parapu and pāruvēṇṭa festivals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1461
Āgunēṭi savuṁmme saṁvvatsara Āṣāḍa śu 11 lu
śrīma(ṁ)drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī satāsivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu ra
tna siṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛthivisāṁbrājaṁ śēyucuṁ
ḍagānu Ātriyasagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yejuśā
khā(ṁ)dhyayulaina śrīmaNmahāmaṁḍalēśvara cinatimmarāju
koṁḍayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru śrīĀhōbala śrīna
raśiṁhvadēvuniki celle jilleḷagrāmamaṁdali mahārā
caprayōjanālaku vaccina kānike kaṭṇālavallanu vacci
na rokhaṁ yī jilleḷagrāmamaṁdali śrīvīrabadradēvuni
ki parapu pāruveṁṭa mahōtsālaku Āhōbala
staḷamaṁdali Aśēṣaṁ saṁmatininni sahiraṇyōdaka
dānadhārāpūrvvakaṁgānu trivācikaṁgānu dhā
rapōśi yistimi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ parada
ttāmapālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnu
pālanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanāda
cyutaṁ padaṁ . yiṁduku yevvaru tappinānu
gaṁgakartta gōvu brāṁhmanni vadhiṁccina pāpāna
pōduru .
Digital edition of SII 16.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
